COURT TRIAL

MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Settlement on the Record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Irene Burns.
Michael Raifsnider, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Greg Resnick, also present.
Defendant: Billy Robinson, present in pro per.
Parties settled, agreed to terms and signed the Stipulation for Entry of Judgment, filed in court.
See terms in scanned doc.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL JOSEPH RAIFSNIDER FOR PLAINTIFF GREG RESNICK, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT

MATTER IS TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.
